creator: monwarez@mailoo.org
text:
(In reply to Rainer Hurling from comment #6)
I don't see why we would need to change the Makefile from upstream. The dependencies target is simply a convenient way to install the required dependency as an end user that would build directly from the repository.

The port is currently linux version agnostics, it didn't specify which linux version to use so it will change to rl9 once the default is rl9.
